chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-565 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 10.12.2025 Mr. Haider Raza, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Irshad Ahmed Shaikh, AAG --------- Counsel for the petitioner submits that he has challenged the order dated 02.05.2024 passed by learned Addl. District Judge-IV, Karachi Central, whereby rent appeal was allowed and the matter was remanded back to the learned trial Court for a decision afresh on merits after recording of the evidence of the parties. Counsel for the petitioner further submits that he will not press the instant petition, if the trial Court is directed to expedite the matter and decide the same within the shortest possible time. Such proposition has not been opposed by learned AAG. This petition is, however, disposed of with direction to the trial Court to seize with the matter and to expedite and conclude the same within the shortest possible time. JUDGE Nadir*
